note: Prices are per 1M tokens in USD. Only providers that publish cached-input pricing are shown as cache-eligible. Always confirm current rates on the provider's pricing page before committing to a budget.

scenarios.name: Customer support bot with long system prompt
scenarios.description: A detailed system prompt, brand voice rules, and FAQ context that repeats across tickets.

scenarios.name: Coding assistant with few-shot examples
scenarios.description: Repeated examples, style guide, and repository context that can sit in the cache.

scenarios.name: RAG agent with reused document context
scenarios.description: The same knowledge-base chunks are prepended to many user queries.

scenarios.name: Content automation with repeated brand brief
scenarios.description: A fixed brand brief, templates, and SEO rules cached across generations.
